get.summary: Fetches a single Widget by id.
get.description:
Fetches a single `Widget` by id.  For the collection form, see
[WidgetService.ListWidgets](#/WidgetService/WidgetService_ListWidgets).
Lists every `Widget`.  Each item carries a `WidgetStatus`.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Maximum number of `Widget` items to return in one page.

tags.name: WidgetService
tags.description: Manages `Widget` resources.  Start with [WidgetService.GetWidget](#/WidgetService/WidgetService_GetWidget) to fetch one.

ListWidgetsResponse.description: A page of `Widget` results returned by [WidgetService.ListWidgets](#/WidgetService/WidgetService_ListWidgets).

Widget.description: A widget.  Its lifecycle state is a `WidgetStatus`; the display label lives in `name`.

status.description: Current lifecycle state — one of the `WidgetStatus` values.

WidgetStatus.description:
Lifecycle state of a `Widget`.

- `WIDGET_STATUS_UNSPECIFIED` — Default, unset state.

- `WIDGET_STATUS_ACTIVE` — The `Widget` is active and visible.

- `WIDGET_STATUS_ARCHIVED` — The `Widget` has been archived.
